    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    R

    read(String) - Static method in class app.data.FileDatabase
    Reads all data from a file and returns it as a list of string arrays.
    ReportController - Class in app.controllers
    Controller class responsible for handling report-related requests and delegating them to the ReportService.
    ReportController() - Constructor for class app.controllers.ReportController
     
    ReportService - Class in app.services
    Service class responsible for generating financial reports for users.
    ReportService() - Constructor for class app.services.ReportService
     
    ReportUI - Class in app.ui
    User Interface class responsible for displaying financial reports.
    ReportUI(Stage, User) - Constructor for class app.ui.ReportUI
    Constructs the ReportUI with required dependencies.
